across.clue: to gently move your hand over skin hair or fur.
if someone occupies a room building area of land seat bed or other place during a period of time they use it.
a quick look at someone or something.
someone who has the right to live permanently in a particular country and has the right to the legal and social benefits of that country as well as legal obligations towards it
Good at thinking clearly and quickly at understanding difficult ideas and subjects and at gaining and using knowledge.
a book that many people buy
A lesson in which a small group of students discuss a subject with a tutor especially at a university or college.
the type of life you have for example the type of job or house you have or the type of activity you like doing

down.clue: Decide or end something | Come to / Arrive at / Reach a ___
To decide that something will not be done at the time when it was planned for but at a later time.
Begin working on something | Make a ___ (on sth)
a thin piece of cloth or plastic that is sticky on one side and that you put on your skin to cover a cut.
the place where someone or something is going.
Different from something else and able to be used instead of it.
someone who is walking especially in a town or city instead of driving or riding.
Someone or something that is efficient works well and produces good results by using the available time money supplies etc in the most effective way.
an advertisement for a film or television programme that shows a short part of that film or programme.
if soldiers march they walk in a group with each person matching the speed and movements of the others.
